title: I'm just glad Samsung's price hikes weren't worse - Engadget
summary: The arrival of Samsung's latest crop of foldable flagship and ultra-flagship devices came with a $100 price increase across the board. The industry-wide price rises have certainly been tough to swallow, and it's clear it's made a lot of people reconsider purchases.
caption: output/2026-07-23/i-m-just-glad-samsung-s-price-hikes-weren-t-worse-engadget.txt
